SEARCH

Package neqsim.process.optimization.valuechain

package neqsim.process.optimization.valuechain
  • Class
    Description
    DebottleneckingAdvisor
    Ranks candidate debottlenecking investments by their incremental net present value.
    DebottleneckingAdvisor.DebottleneckCandidate
    A candidate debottlenecking investment.
    DebottleneckingAdvisor.Recommendation
    A ranked recommendation for one candidate upgrade.
    EconomicParameters
    Economic and carbon parameters shared by the value-chain optimization classes.
    LifeOfFieldOptimizer
    Multi-period (life-of-field) optimizer that schedules capital investments in time.
    LifeOfFieldOptimizer.Investment
    A candidate capital investment that may be installed in a chosen year.
    LifeOfFieldOptimizer.LifeOfFieldEvaluator
    Functional evaluator returning the net annual cash flow for one period.
    LifeOfFieldOptimizer.LifeOfFieldResult
    Result of a life-of-field optimization.
    NetworkAllocationOptimizer
    Allocates a fixed shared total across competing legs to maximise a coupled objective.
    NetworkAllocationOptimizer.AllocationEvaluator
    Functional evaluator that scores a candidate allocation.
    NetworkAllocationOptimizer.AllocationResult
    Result of scoring or optimizing an allocation.
    ParallelSweep
    Evaluates a batch of decision vectors in parallel, preserving input order.
    ParallelSweep.SweepEvaluator<R>
    Functional evaluator that scores one decision vector and returns a result object.
    RealTimeOptimizationLoop
    Orchestrates a closed-loop real-time optimization (RTO) cycle.
    RealTimeOptimizationLoop.Calibrator
    Stage that calibrates the model to the latest measurements.
    RealTimeOptimizationLoop.CycleRecord
    Immutable record of one executed RTO cycle.
    RealTimeOptimizationLoop.ObjectiveProbe
    Stage that probes the achieved objective after setpoints are applied.
    RealTimeOptimizationLoop.PlantReader
    Stage that reads current plant measurements.
    RealTimeOptimizationLoop.SetpointOptimizer
    Stage that computes new setpoints from the calibrated model.
    RealTimeOptimizationLoop.SetpointWriter
    Stage that pushes setpoints to the plant.
    RobustOptimizationStudy
    Evaluates the robustness of operating decisions against parameter uncertainty.
    RobustOptimizationStudy.RobustResult
    Robustness summary of one decision across all scenarios.
    RobustOptimizationStudy.ScenarioEvaluator
    Functional evaluator returning the outcome of a decision under a scenario.
    RobustOptimizationStudy.ScenarioOutcome
    Outcome of one decision under one scenario.
    RobustOptimizationStudy.ScenarioSampler
    Functional sampler that draws an uncertain-parameter scenario.
    ValueChainObjective
    Converts a converged process operating point into a single economic objective value.
    ValueChainObjective.ValueResult
    Immutable breakdown of the economic value of a single operating point.
